info.name: HITProduct API
info.description: Postman collection cho HITProduct API. Auth dang ky bang OTP: Gui OTP Dang Ky -> Xac Thuc OTP Dang Ky. Co request gui lai OTP cho dang ky va quen mat khau.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Auth API: dang ky bang OTP email, gui lai OTP xac thuc email, dang nhap, token, dang xuat va quen mat khau.

item.name: Gui OTP Xac Thuc Email Dang Ky

request.description: Gui OTP ve email de xac thuc dang ky. Endpoint nay chua tao user ngay, server chi luu pending registration. Sau khi nhan email, dien ma vao bien `registerOtp` roi chay Xac Thuc OTP Dang Ky.
Xac thuc OTP dang ky. Neu dung, server tao user, tra `accessToken` va set cookie `refreshToken`.

item.name: Gui Lai OTP Xac Thuc Email Dang Ky

request.description: Gui lai OTP xac thuc email dang ky. Can co pending registration tu request Gui OTP Xac Thuc Email Dang Ky.

Dang nhap. Body tra ve accessToken, refreshToken nam trong httpOnly cookie.

Script tu dong luu `accessToken` vao bien collection.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "message": "Dang nhap thanh cong.",
  "data": { "accessToken": "<jwt>" }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400`: Validation that bai
- `401`: Email hoac mat khau khong dung

exec: pm.test("Co accessToken, khong co refreshToken trong body", () => {

request.description:
Lay accessToken moi khi accessToken het han. KHONG can body: server doc refreshToken tu cookie (Postman tu gui cookie).

Ap dung token rotation: refreshToken cu bi vo hieu, cookie duoc cap moi qua Set-Cookie.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "message": "Cap token moi thanh cong.",
  "data": { "accessToken": "<jwt_moi>" }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `401`: Thieu cookie / token khong hop le / het han / session khong ton tai

exec: console.log('accessToken moi da duoc cap nhat.');

request.description:
Dang xuat khoi thiet bi hien tai. KHONG can body: server doc refreshToken tu cookie, xoa session tuong ung va clear cookie.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "message": "Dang xuat thanh cong."
}
```

exec: console.log('accessToken da duoc xoa khoi bien.');

request.description:
Dang xuat khoi TAT CA thiet bi (xoa toan bo session cua nguoi dung) va clear cookie.

**Yeu cau xac thuc:** `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "message": "Dang xuat tat ca thiet bi thanh cong."
}
```

**Errors:**
- `401`: Thieu hoac accessToken khong hop le / het han

exec: console.log('Tat ca tokens da duoc xoa.');

request.description: ??i m?t kh?u v? t?y ch?n ??ng xu?t c?c thi?t b? kh?c. Session hi?n t?i ???c gi? l?i. Y?u c?u access token c? sessionId.
Gui OTP dat lai mat khau. Response khong lam lo email co ton tai.

item.name: Gui Lai OTP Quen Mat Khau

request.description: Gui lai OTP quen mat khau. Sau khi nhan OTP moi, dien vao bien `otp` de chay Reset Password.
Dat lai mat khau bang OTP. Dien bien collection {{otp}} tu email.
Khong tu theo redirect. Mo header Location trong trinh duyet; callback tra JSON accessToken va dat refreshToken cookie.
Lay ho so nguoi dung hien tai; khong tra passwordHash.
Cap nhat displayName, avatarUrl va defaultQuizSize.

item.name: Folders
item.description: API thu muc. Folder chi CRUD; danh sach deck trong folder lay qua GET /decks?folderId={{folderId}}. Xoa folder se go folderId tren deck, KHONG xoa deck.

request.description: Liet ke folder cua user hien tai, sap xep moi nhat truoc.
Tao folder moi. Script tu dong luu data._id vao {{folderId}}.
Lay chi tiet folder. API nay chi tra thong tin folder, khong populate deck; muon lay deck trong folder dung request List Decks In Folder.

exec: if (!folderId) { throw new Error('Thieu folderId. Hay chay Create Folder truoc.'); }

request.description: Doi ten folder. Body chi co name.

exec: if (!folderId) { throw new Error('Thieu folderId. Hay chay Create Folder truoc.'); }

request.description: Lay deck nam trong folder hien tai. Day la API thay the cho viec folder populate deckIds.

exec: if (!folderId) { throw new Error('Thieu folderId. Hay chay Create Folder truoc.'); }

request.description: Xoa folder. Cac deck trong folder khong bi xoa; server se set folderId=null cho cac deck do.

exec: if (!folderId) { throw new Error('Thieu folderId. Hay chay Create Folder truoc.'); }

item.name: Decks
item.description: API deck. Deck co truong folderId tuy chon; tao/update deck co the gan vao folder. GET /decks?folderId={{folderId}} de loc theo folder.

request.description: Liet ke tat ca deck cua user hien tai.
Loc deck cua user theo folderId. Can chay Create Folder truoc de co {{folderId}}.

exec: if (!folderId) { throw new Error('Thieu folderId. Hay chay Create Folder truoc.'); }

request.description: Liet ke deck public cua moi nguoi.
Tim deck public theo tu khoa q. Ho tro sort=newest|popular, page>=1, limit 1..50. Script luu deck dau tien vao {{deckId}} neu co ket qua.

exec: pm.test("Tra ve danh sach va phan trang", () => {

request.description: Lay deck public co phan trang, khong truyen q. Dung de test list/search mac dinh va validate response { data, total, page, limit }.
Tao deck moi khong nam trong folder. Script tu dong luu data._id vao {{deckId}}.
Tao deck va gan luon vao folder hien tai. Can {{folderId}} hop le; script luu deck moi vao {{deckId}}.

exec: if (!folderId) { throw new Error('Thieu folderId. Hay chay Create Folder truoc.'); }

request.description: Chi tiet deck cua minh hoac deck public.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }

request.description: Cap nhat title / description / visibility. Body can it nhat mot truong.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }

request.description: Gan/chuyen deck vao folder. API moi dung PUT /decks/{{deckId}} voi body { folderId }, khong con POST /folders/:id/decks.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }
if (!folderId) { throw new Error('Thieu folderId. Hay chay Create Folder truoc.'); }

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }

item.name: Flashcards
item.description: API the hoc (flashcard), long trong deck: /decks/{{deckId}}/cards. Create Card luu {{cardId}}.

request.description: Liet ke the trong deck theo sortOrder.
Them the moi. distractors la dap an nhieu thu cong (tuy chon). Script luu data._id vao {{cardId}}.
Sap xep lai thu tu the. Dat route truoc /:cardId.
Sua front / back / distractors cua the.
Xoa the; deck.cardCount duoc dong bo lai.

item.name: Study - Lat The
item.description: Che do lat the. Flow: Start Study Session -> Review Card - Remembered/Not Remembered. API dung CardProgress de luu remembered/learning.

request.description: BUOC 1: Lay danh sach the de lat. Script tu luu the dau tien vao {{studyCardId}} va tao body review mau.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }
pm.test("Co it nhat mot the de review", () => {

request.description: BUOC 2: Bam Da nho. Body { remembered: true }, server cap nhat CardProgress status=remembered.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }
if (!cardId) { throw new Error('Thieu studyCardId/cardId. Hay chay Start Study Session hoac Create Card truoc.'); }

request.description: Bam Chua nho. Body { remembered: false }, server cap nhat CardProgress status=learning.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }
if (!cardId) { throw new Error('Thieu studyCardId/cardId. Hay chay Start Study Session hoac Create Card truoc.'); }

request.description: Review bang body mau trong {{studyReviewBody}}. Mac dinh la { remembered: true }; co the sua bien nay de test nhanh.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }
if (!cardId) { throw new Error('Thieu studyCardId/cardId. Hay chay Start Study Session hoac Create Card truoc.'); }
if (!body) { throw new Error('Thieu studyReviewBody. Hay chay Start Study Session truoc.'); }
try { JSON.parse(body); } catch (error) { throw new Error(`studyReviewBody khong phai JSON hop le: ${error.message}`); }

request.description: Lay rieng cac the chua hoc (status=new).

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }

request.description: Lay cac the new + learning de tiep tuc hoc.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc.'); }

item.name: Quiz
item.description: Test quiz de hon: chay Generate Quiz truoc, request nay tu luu quizSubmitBody; sau do chay Submit Quiz - Auto.

request.description:
BUOC 1: Sinh quiz va tu tao body nop bai.

Chay request nay truoc. Script se tu luu:
- `quizAttemptId`
- `quizSubmitBody`: body day du de gui sang Submit Quiz - Auto
- cac bien rieng cho multiple_choice / true_false / written

Sau do chay request `Submit Quiz - Auto`. Neu bi 404, kiem tra `deckId` da co gia tri chua va deck co ton tai khong.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc de Postman luu {{deckId}}.'); }
console.log("quizSubmitBody da duoc tao. Chay request Submit Quiz - Auto.");

request.description: BUOC 2: Nop bai tu dong. Chay Generate Quiz truoc de tao {{quizSubmitBody}}, sau do bam Send request nay. Muon test lai thi chay Generate Quiz lai vi attempt chi nop duoc mot lan.

exec: if (!body) { throw new Error('Thieu quizSubmitBody. Hay chay Generate Quiz truoc.'); }
try { JSON.parse(body); } catch (error) { throw new Error(`quizSubmitBody khong phai JSON hop le: ${error.message}`); }

request.description: Nop bai voi du 3 dang cau hoi: chon dap an multiple_choice, dung/sai true_false, va tra loi text written. Chay Generate Quiz truoc de luu cac bien questionId/answer.
Test rieng dang chon dap an multiple_choice. `selectedAnswer` phai la mot gia tri trong `options` cua cau hoi. Chay Generate Quiz lai truoc request nay neu attempt da nop.
Test rieng dang dung/sai true_false. `selectedAnswer` gui string `true` hoac `false`. Chay Generate Quiz lai truoc request nay neu attempt da nop.
Test rieng dang tra loi text written. `selectedAnswer` la chuoi nguoi dung nhap. Chay Generate Quiz lai truoc request nay neu attempt da nop.

item.name: Learn
item.description: API che do hoc Learn. Flow de test: Build Learn Round -> Submit Learn Answer - Auto. Cac request rieng dung de test multiple_choice / true_false / written.

request.description: BUOC 1: Sinh mot vong Learn va tu tao body tra loi mau. Chay request nay truoc, sau do chay Submit Learn Answer - Auto.

exec: if (!deckId) { throw new Error('Thieu deckId. Hay chay Create Deck truoc de Postman luu {{deckId}}.'); }
console.log("learnAnswerBody da duoc tao. Chay Submit Learn Answer - Auto.");
pm.test("Co it nhat mot cau co the tra loi", () => {

request.description: BUOC 2: Cham cau tra loi Learn tu dong. Chay Build Learn Round truoc de tao {{learnAnswerBody}}, sau do bam Send request nay. Muon test tiep thi chay Build Learn Round lai.

exec: if (!body) { throw new Error('Thieu learnAnswerBody. Hay chay Build Learn Round truoc.'); }
try { JSON.parse(body); } catch (error) { throw new Error(`learnAnswerBody khong phai JSON hop le: ${error.message}`); }

request.description: Test rieng cau chon dap an. Build Learn Round se lay option dau tien lam selectedAnswer mau.

exec: if (!body) { throw new Error('Chua co cau multiple_choice. Hay chay Build Learn Round lai hoac them nhieu the hon.'); }

request.description: Test rieng cau dung/sai. Body gom flashcardId, type=true_false, selectedAnswer=true/false va statement de server cham.

exec: if (!body) { throw new Error('Chua co cau true_false. Hay chay Build Learn Round lai hoac them nhieu the hon.'); }

request.description: Test rieng cau tra loi text. Build Learn Round se dien selectedAnswer mau la xin chao; co the sua bien learnWrittenAnswerBody neu muon test dung/sai.

exec: if (!body) { throw new Error('Chua co cau written. Hay chay Build Learn Round lai hoac them nhieu the hon.'); }

request.description: Kiem tra server co dang chay khong. Khong co prefix /api/v1.

exec: throw new Error('baseUrl phai la http://localhost:3000/api/v1 de goi API backend.');
